title: Dina Snow
compiled_truth: Dina Snow is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-31 to 2002-03-29), Dina Snow sent 18 and received 212 emails, totalling 230 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (14), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (10), [Lou Stoler](people/lou-stoler) (9), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (8), [Peggy Banczak](people/peggy-banczak) (8). Mailbox folders observed: calendar, inbox.
